Dimension Mark I
(Alteration)

Level: 9
Range: 0
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: Caster
Saving Throw: None


This spell creates dimension rift (mark) which is used as destination point for return. Only one dimension mark can be cast at same time.

Dimension Gate I
(Alteration)

Level: 9
Range: Unlimited
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: Party
Saving Throw: None


This spell transports the party to any place which was previously selected with Dimension Mark I. When the spell is cast, a dimension gate opens up in front of the party, who immediately steps through it. Upon passing through the gate, the party appear at chosen destination. Caster must concentrate all <PRO_HISHER> mind, otherwise the party could appear somewhere inside wall or door.

Amulet Of Cleansing
Wearer is protected by magic, if loses control amulet will awake him.

STATISTICS:
– Armor Class: +3
– Saving Throws: +3
– Maximum Health +20

Equipped abilities:
– Wearer is freed from any negative effects if lose control, nearby enemies in 15-ft. radius lose beneficial effects

  Cleanse and Purge: This spell enables the caster to hurl purification orb which explode and split to two orbs, first green cleanse orb removes all negative effects from friendly targets like Offensive Damage, Disabling, Battleground and Conjuration Effects.
Second red purge orb removes one protection per type like Combat, Non-Combat, Combination, Illusionary, Specific and Spell Protections. In addition enemies must save vs. Spell with -2 penalty or are afflicted by entropic purge all effects from protections type are removed.

Ring of Holy Promise
There is an inscription on the ring: "Light shall protect you!"

STATISTICS:

Equipped abilities:
– Armor Class: +2
– Saving Throws: +2
– Wearer is protected by shield for 2 rounds when being hit. This effect can occurs once per 5 rounds.

  Spirit Shell: Protects target from physical attacks and spells. Shield, barrier of pure light absorbs 6 physical attacks and 15 spell levels, but only for certain spell types like:
Offensive Damage, Battleground, Disabling, Magic Attack.
Target receives bonus +8 Armor and is immune to all magical weapons.

Charge abilities:

– Greater Healing 3 times per day
  Range: Visual
  Duration: Permanent
  Area of Effect: 1 creature

A ring is a small band of precious metal that is used as jewelry. Some rare rings have had enchantments placed upon them that confer various magical abilities. These rings are highly sought after, especially by those of the adventuring profession.

STATISTICS:

Weight: 0

Power Word: Shield
(Abjuration)

Level: 7
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 Turn
Casting Time: Instant
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from physical attacks and spells. Shield, barrier of pure light absorbs 1 physical attack per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 10 and 3 spell levels per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 30, but only for certain spell types like:
Offensive Damage, Battleground, Disabling, Combination, Magic Attack.
Target receives bonus +1 Armor per 4 levels of caster up to maximum +5 AC.

Redemption
(Necromancy)

Level: 1
Sphere: Necromantic
Range: Touch
Duration: Permanent
Casting Time: 6
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Resurrection will return a character back to life. However, Resurrection also heals the character so that they are ready for the adventuring life right away.

Lightning Ball
(Abjuration)

Level: 5
Range: Visual
Duration: 1-3 rounds
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 4-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

Hurls a ball of lightning at the target, dealing 1d8+5 lightning damage per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 10d8+5, half if target saves vs. Spell with -2 penalty otherwise target is stuned for 1 round per 6 levels of caster up to maximum 3 rounds at level 18.

Volcano
(Evocation)

Level: 7
Sphere: Elemental (Fire)
Range: Visual
Duration: 10 rounds
Casting Time: 6
Area of Effect: 6-ft. 8-ft. 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

Volcano hurls a rock of molten lava at a random enemy. Enemies within 6-ft. radius from centre of volcano take 1d12 magic fire damage per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 10d12, ignores magic resistances. Enemies within 8-ft. radius from centre of volcano take 1d5 fire damage per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 5d5, half if target save vs. Spell and 1d6 crushing damage per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 5d6, half if save vs. Spell, crushing damage ignores magic resistances. Enemies within 15-ft. radius from centre of volcano take 1d4 fire damage per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 5d4, half if target save vs. Spell.

Divine shield
(Abjuration)

Level: 1
Range: Visual
Duration: 2 rounds
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from all damage and spells for duration of spell.

Sacred Divine Shield
(Abjuration)

Level: 1
Range: Visual
Duration: 4 rounds
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from all damage and spells for duration of spell.

Divine Aegis
(Abjuration)

Level: 7
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 Turn
Casting Time: Instant
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from physical attacks and spells. Shield, barrier of pure light absorbs 1 physical attack per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 10 and 4 spell levels per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 40, but only for certain spell types like:
Offensive Damage, Battleground, Disabling, Magic Attack.
Target receives bonus +2 Armor per 4 levels of caster up to maximum +10 AC and is immune to all magical weapons.

Spirit Shell
(Abjuration)

Level: 6
Range: Visual
Duration: 2 rounds
Casting Time: Instant
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from physical attacks and spells. Shield, barrier of pure light absorbs 6 physical attacks and 15 spell levels, but only for certain spell types like:
Offensive Damage, Battleground, Disabling, Magic Attack.
Target receives bonus +8 Armor and is immune to all magical weapons.

This scroll describes how to create squirrel magic figurine.

  "Find singing squirrel and turn him into stone"

Force Shield
(Abjuration)

Level: 7
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 Turn
Casting Time: Instant
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Protects target from physical attacks and spells. Shield, barrier of pure light absorbs 1 physical attack per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 10 and 4 spell levels per 2 levels of caster up to maximum 40, but only for certain spell types like:
Offensive Damage, Battleground, Disabling, Magic Attack.
Target receives bonus +1 Armor, +15 fire/cold/lightning/acid resistances per 4 levels of caster up to maximum +5 AC, +75 resistances. Pierce of shield by an attack or spell causes massive explosion 1d4+2 damage as magical fire, magical cold, electricity, acid damage up to maximum 4d4+10 to all enemies within 15-ft. radius and must save vs. Breath with -4 penalty or are knocked away.

This scroll describes how to create squirrel magic figurine.

  "Find singing squirrel and turn him into stone"
This must be the scroll which could cure squirreliness!

Kirin Tor Teleport
(Alteration)

Level: 1
Range: 2000
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: The caster
Saving Throw: None

This spell transports the caster to any place within the range of the spell. When the spell is cast, a dimensional portal opens up in front of the caster, who immediately steps through it. Upon passing through the portal, the caster finds <PRO_HIMHER>self at <PRO_HISHER> chosen destination.

Frost Nova
(Abjuration)

Level: 9
Range: Visual
Duration: 3 rounds
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 10-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Neg.

All enemies must save vs. Paralyze with -5 penalty, otherwise are frozen by freezing wave of frost and take 2d12+2 magic cold damage, half if save vs. Paralyze with -5 penalty.

Blast Wave
(Evocation)

Level: 9
Range: Visual
Duration: Special
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 11-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

Causes a flame explosion around yourself, dealing damage to all enemies within 11 yards, causes 1d10+3 magic fire damage per 5 levels of caster up to maximum 4d10+12, half if save vs. Breath with -5 penalty, knocking them back, and slow them for duration of spell if not save vs. Breath with -5 penalty. In addition, targets must save vs. Spell with -5 penalty or fall unconscious for 1 round. Enemies, which dear to resist massive flame from being knocked will buy full flame shower, are afflicted by ignite, suffer 1d4+1 magical fire damage per 5 levels of caster up to maximum 4d4+4 and must save vs. Spell with -2 penalty of are feared and slowed.

Cleanse and Purge
(Abjuration)

Level: 8
Range: 40 ft.
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 3 
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

This spell enables the caster to hurl purification orb which explode and split to two orbs, first green cleanse orb removes all negative effects from friendly targets like Offensive Damage, Disabling, Battleground and Conjuration Effects.
Second red purge orb removes one protection per type like Combat, Non-Combat, Combination, Illusionary, Specific and Spell Protections. In addition enemies must save vs. Spell with -2 penalty or are afflicted by entropic purge all effects from protections type are removed.

Armageddon
(Evocation)

Level: 9
Range: 270 ft.
Duration: 4 rounds
Casting Time: 6
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: 1/2

When the caster utters the words to this powerful spell, <PRO_HESHE> calls upon powerful forces indeed. These forces pull down meteors from above, hurling them randomly at anyone in the area of effect. Enemies caught in the destructive path of the meteors—whether will suffer 4d10 points of magic fire damage 2 times per round, half if save vs. Spell with -2 penalty. The caster is well advised to be careful in <PRO_HISHER> use of this spell.

Arcane Explosion
(Alternation)

Level: 9
Sphere: Arcane (Magic)
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 rounds
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

Causes an explosion of arcane magic around the caster, causing 1d15+3 magic damage per 4 levels of caster to all enemy targets within 15 yards up to maximum 5d15+15. Enemies are slowed for 1 round. In addition enemies must save vs. Breath with -4 penalty or are knocked away from caster, in such case must save vs. Spell with -4 penalty also or fall unconscious to ground for 1 round.

Molten Blast
(Evocation)

Level: 7
Sphere: Elemental (Fire)
Range: Visual
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: Path of bolt
Saving Throw: Special

Hurls incinerating flame orb, any enemy in path must save vs. Death or is incinerated, suffers 10d10+40 fire damage per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 50d10+200. In addition target takes 1d5+10 fire damager per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 5d5+10. Targets with fire resistances 100 or higher are not affected by this spell. Ignores magic resistances.

Black Hole
(Conjuration/Summoning)

Level: 8
Sphere: Shadow (Magic)
Range: Visual
Duration: 10 rounds
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Special

Creates a black hole at the designated location, that pulls enemies to its center. Enemies within 15-ft. radius are automatically slowed for half round and must save vs. Spell with -4 penalty every half round or are pulled to the center and suffer 2d4 magic damage. In addition enemies within 8-ft. radius from center of black hole must save vs. Death with -8 penalty or are slowed for 1 round and pulled to the center of black hole by even more devastating force, suffer 2d8 crushing damage, half if save vs. Death with -8 penalty. Enemies which dear resist to this force, have to make a huge effort and are fatigued for 2 rounds. After 10 round black hole explodes and push all enemies away from center.

Greater Pyroblast
(Evocation)

Level: 8
Range: 40 ft.
Duration: 2 rounds
Casting Time: 6
Area of Effect: 8-ft. radius
Saving Throw: 1/2 

Hurls an immense fiery boulder that deals 1d15+5 magic fire damage per 3 levels of caster up to maximum 10d15+50, half if save vs. Spell with -4 penalty. At the end of path boulder explodes and causes 1d10+2 fire damage per 3 levels of caster up to maximum 10d10+20 fire damage, half if save vs. Breath with -2 penalty, in addition enemies are afflicted by ignite 2 times per round for 2 rounds, suffer 1d6 fire damage per 10 levels of caster up to maximum 3d6 and are feared for half round if fail to save vs. Spell with -2 penalty.

Time Rift
(Abjuration)

Level: 9
Range: 0
Duration: 10 Turns
Casting Time: 6
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

Creates time rift sphere, which causes time anomalies, friendly targets receive +1 AC, +1 THACO, +1 casting speed, haste, aura cleansing up to maximum +4 AC / THACO / casting speed. Enemies lose -1 AC, -1 THACO, -1 casting speed, slow up to maximum -4 AC / THACO / casting speed.

Prismatic Barrier
(Abjuration)

Level: 7
Range: 0
Duration: 10 rounds
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: 7-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

Creates magic dome, grants +50 magic resistances to all friendly targets within 7-ft. radius.

Lightning Strike
(Conjuration)

Level: 8
Range: Visual
Duration: 2 rounds
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: Special 

Upon casting this spell, the wizard releases a powerful stroke of electrical energy that inflicts 1d20+8 lightning damage per 4 levels of the caster (maximum damage of 5d20+40) to enemy. A successful Saving Throw vs. Spell with -4 penalty reduces this damage to half, otherwise target suffers full damage and is knocked down to ground for 2 rounds. This spell completely ignores magic and lightning resistances, summoned monsters and demons are killed immediately. Enemies killed by this spell die a terrific death.

Power Word, Kill
(Conjuration/Summoning) 

Level: 9
Range: Visual range of the caster 
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1 
Area of Effect: 1 creature 
Saving Throw: None

When a Power Word: Kill spell is uttered, one creature within the spell range is slain. The creature must have 100 or fewer current Hit Points, otherwise the spell has no effect. There is no Saving Throw. Spell ignores magic resistances

Flame Shock
(Evocation)

Level: 8
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 round/5 levels
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: Special

Sears the target with fire, causing 1d6+3 fire damage per 5 levels of caster, up to maximum 4d6+12 fire damage. In addition target must save vs. Spell with -4 penalty or suffers 1d6+3 magic fire damage and falls unconscious for 1 round per 5 levels of caster, up to maximum 4d6+12 magic fire damage and 4 rounds unconscious.

Acid Ball
(Evocation)

Level: 8
Range: Visual
Duration: 2 rounds/4 levels
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 4-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

Caster hurls acid ball, all enemies within 4 ft. radius hit by this spell suffer 1d6+4 acid damage, up to maximum 5d6+20 and must save vs. Spell with -2 penalty or receive -2 cumulative penalty to THAC0 for 2 rounds per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 10 rounds, suffers 1d10+2 acid damage per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 5d10+10 acid damage, half if save vs. Spell with -2 penalty.

MK Fireball
(Evocation)

Level: 8
Range: Visual
Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 4-ft. radius
Saving Throw: 1/2

Hurls 3 balls of fire dealing 1d10+2 magical fire damage to enemies within 4-ft. radius up to maximum 5d10+10 damage, half if save vs. Spell with -2 penalty.

Glacial Spike
(Evocation)

Level: 8
Range: Visual
Duration: 1 round/4 levels
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: 4-ft. radius
Saving Throw: None

Creates a massive spike of ice, dealing 2d4+8 magical cold damage, up to maximum 10d4+40, half if target save vs. Spell with -4 penalty. In addition target is slowed, loses -1 AC for 1 round per 4 levels of caster up to maximum -5 AC for 5 rounds and is frozen also for 4 seconds per 4 levels of caster up to maximum 20 seconds if fail save vs. Spell with -4 penalty.

Prismatic Shield
(Abjuration)

Level: 7
Range: Visual
Duration: 4 rounds/4 levels
Casting Time: 1
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

Creates magic shield, grants +50 magic resistances and +50 magical damage resistances to a target.

Enhanced Web
(Evocation)

Level: 2
Range: 40 ft.
Duration: 1 turn
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius
Saving Throw: Neg.

A Web spell creates a many-layered mass of strong, sticky strands similar to spider webs but far larger and tougher. The Web spell covers a maximum area of about 15 ft. in radius (roughly the same size as a Fireball). Creatures caught within webs, or simply touching them, become stuck among the gluey fibers. Anyone in the area when the spell is cast must roll a Saving Throw vs. Spell with a -2 penalty. If the Saving Throw is successful, then the creature is free to move out of the area. A failed Saving Throw means the creature is stuck in the webs unable to move. Each round that a creature remains in the web, it must make a Saving Throw or be unable to move.

Boo was a fuzzy, little hamster. While Minsc believes that Boo was a miniature giant space hamster, you are rather certain that the tiny rodent was just a normal hamster. But now ... he is transformed into squirrel, Minsc is very mad from his squirreliness.

STATISTICS:

  Cooldown: 3 Turns
  Area of Effect: 15-ft. radius sphere

These swords are usually referred to as double-edged swords, war swords, or military swords. In many cases, the long sword has a single-edged blade. There is no single version of the long sword; the design and length vary from culture to culture and may vary within the same culture depending on the era. Among the most common characteristics of all long swords is their length, which ranges from thirty-five inches to forty-seven inches. In the latter case, the blade is known to take up forty inches of the total length. Most long swords have a double-edged blade and a sharp point at the tip. Despite the tip, the long sword is designed for slashing, not thrusting.

STATISTICS:

Damage: 1d8 (slashing)
Speed Factor: 5
Proficiency Type: Long Sword
Type: One-handed
Requires:
 6 Strength

Weight: 4

Wearer is protected by magic, if loses control amulet will awake him.

STATISTICS:
– Armor Class: +3
– Saving Throws: +3
– Maximum Health +20

Equipped abilities:
– Wearer is freed from any negative effects if lose control, nearby enemies in 15-ft. radius lose beneficial effects

  Cleanse and Purge: This spell enables the caster to hurl purification orb which explode and split to two orbs, first green cleanse orb removes all negative effects from friendly targets like Offensive Damage, Disabling, Battleground and Conjuration Effects.
Second red purge orb removes one protection per type like Combat, Non-Combat, Combination, Illusionary, Specific and Spell Protections. In addition enemies must save vs. Spell with -2 penalty or are afflicted by entropic purge all effects from protections type are removed.

sum: Adds Dimension Gate I-X and Dimension Mark I-X teleportation spells for cross-map teleportation to any BG2/ToB/EET area.
no: Teleportation spell mod by gamemacik. Dimension Gate I-X teleports to any official map; Dimension Mark I-X marks return locations. EET-compatible from v1.1.

co.n: Change spell bar location only? (by default both are innate)
Change spell category and spell bar location? (by default both are innate)
co.tp2n: Change spell bar location only? (by default both are innate)

co.n: Change spell category and spell bar location? (by default both are innate)
co.tp2n: Change spell category and spell bar location? (by default both are innate)
